text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(Everybody likes watching me race at my current
size, and I like racing just the way I am now too.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
(And if that's the case, there's only one path for
me to choose.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Whoops! I mean, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I might've lost today, but that there was a
scorchin' hot race! I had a great time out there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My heart's still poundin' up a storm! Just you
watch me! I'm winning the next race for sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wha? Did I say somethin' funny?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No. I was just thinking about how much you enjoy
racing with me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! 'Course I do! It's always so exciting runnin'
against you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've been obsessed with you ever since I watched
you run in the Sprinters S.!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You'd just made your debut back then, and I was
real excited to see what you'd end up bringin' to
the racetrack!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And durin' that race...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has surged to the front! What
overwhelmingly powerful running!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Why, you left me downright thunderstruck!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: This is so excitin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Your size and might made that race hotter than
the sun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And that's when it hit me that you're the key to
everythin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If I raced against you, I'd be able to thrill and
excite my fans and supporters without a doubt!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I couldn't get it out of my head that I had to race with you, or else it'd be pointless!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You think so highly of me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I see... I understand what you mean!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I've felt the same way before too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Akebono! I'll be racin' in the Mile Ch., so
you'd better be prepared 'cause—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I know! I'm won't lose to you either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to the waiting room and wait for Hishi
Akebono to come back. Shortly after...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without warning, she hoists me onto her
shoulders, cutting me off halfway through my
congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I get my bearings back, I realize she's
brought me to the kitchen where we did an
Umastalive stream a while back.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm going to make chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Do you know the recipe I use to make my chanko,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've helped her make it before, but I don't think
she's ever told me the details of it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I suppose you wouldn't! I created my own chanko
after a lot of trial and error as a kid.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I need to go buy some ingredients, but I'll be
right back, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still have no idea what's going on, but it seems
that Hishi Akebono has a plan in mind, so I
patiently wait for her return.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click-click-click... Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: To make my chanko...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You have to make sweet chicken meatballs using
miso and sugar, and simmer them in broth to draw
out the umami flavor.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The broth should be light and made with kombu
seaweed, light soy sauce, sake, mirin, and a pinch
of salt.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's so important to start making the
meatballs as soon as you've set the broth to boil!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After explaining this to me, Hishi Akebono sets a
bowl full of minced chicken in front of herself and
sets to work.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mix in the miso, sugar, garlic, and ginger, then
begin to knead the minced meat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Once it turns whitish, add water and sake in little
by little and knead it some more.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Adding water makes it easier to bring out the
umami flavor in the meat. Don't forget this buono
point! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Last, add in some carrots and potato starch, and
knead it some more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment Hishi Akebono says that, the pot of
broth on the stove starts boiling.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono starts scooping spoonfuls of the
meatball mix and dropping them into the broth
with a well-practiced hand.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, the meatballs are all done!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The meatballs are the most important part of my
chanko, so I'm extra particular about how I make
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always so easygoing in the kitchen, so I had
no idea she was so particular about this step of
the process.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right. The veggies are ready too, so now we
just have to wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gentle yet sweet aroma of the broth begins
to waft from the pot and fills the room.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's started simmering. It won't be long now!
choice_data_list: So why did you suddenly want to make chanko?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, well...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Chanko makes up the heart of every sumo stable.
choice_data_list:
(Oh right, there are different houses of sumo
wrestlers.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Each stable has a different recipe, and wrestlers
become very attached to their own stable's
chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard the training was that day,
they always feel better after a big bowl of
chanko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It helps them do their best day after day.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And because of that...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think they'd be really disappointed if the flavor
of their chanko changed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to be for the people
who come to watch me and my friends who race
against me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And that's a chanko that they know and love.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I step out from the paddock, people
cheer me on and marvel at how big I am.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They love my unique running style, and smile
whenever a race is over.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And I want to keep racing for everyone who looks
at me with such great expectations.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Even if I can't compete as long, I want to keep
running my way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to protect the unique flavor that only I
have.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Here you go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Dig in, Trainer! It tastes the most buono when it's
fresh and hot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat one spoonful of the chanko placed in front
of me, then another.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The meatballs are sweet, and the broth is clear
and refreshing. It tastes the same as it always has,
and like I expected it to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It must pain Hishi Akebono a lot to think of how
this might cut her racing career short.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there is something else she wants to protect
that's more important to her. Her determination
comes across loud and clear.
choice_data_list: Let's win the next race, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
choice_data_list: I'll be there for you every step of the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep her gaze and promise that we'll make it the
best race ever.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best! I'll race with all my strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Hishi Akebono an acknowledging nod—and
suddenly get lifted off my feet by her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Per Hishi Akebono's request, our next race will be
the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's where the fall Ruler of the Mile will be
crowned.
